Task  
The function will use the modulus operator to check divisibility.  
status  
A prime number has no divisors other than 1 and itself.  

* * *  

The function will evaluate the remainder of division.  
status  
A composite number has more than two distinct factors.  

* * *

status  
A prime number is divisible by exactly two numbers.
